title: Zero-Knowledge Time-Locked Contracts
description: Zero-Knowledge Time-Locked Contracts (ZKTLCs) combine timeout-tree ownership virtualization with BitVM-style disprovable computation, allowing a participant to challenge incorrect execution while retaining a unilateral timeout exit.

resources.title: Cube Bitcoin Repository
resources.notes: Implementation context for Cube's Bitcoin-native programmable execution and challenge-response design.

resources.title: BitVM
resources.notes: Primary reference for optimistic, challengeable computation anchored to Bitcoin.

resources.title: Mastering Bitcoin
resources.notes: Background for Bitcoin Script, transactions, and the settlement layer.
